name: github-approval
label: GitHub Approval Flow
description: Manual approval push pipeline with CI feedback

tools.name: gitStatus
tools.description: Show current git branch and status

tools.name: preparePush
tools.description: Commit staged changes and await approval

tools.name: pushWithApproval
tools.description: Push the prepared commit to origin after approval

tools.name: getCiStatus
tools.description: Fetch recent GitHub Actions workflow runs for a branch

tools.name: startCiMonitor
tools.description: Start background polling for CI failures on a branch

tools.name: stopCiMonitor
tools.description: Stop background polling for a branch

tools.name: getCiEvents
tools.description: Retrieve queued CI events discovered by monitors
